## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New Sigma rule
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Sigma rule checklist (if adding a rule)

- [ ] MITRE ATT&CK technique tag included (`attack.tXXXX`)
- [ ] Log sample added to `tests/rule_samples/`
- [ ] False positives documented in rule YAML
- [ ] Rule validated: `sigma check rules/sigma/path/to/rule.yml`
- [ ] Severity is appropriate

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Linting passes (`make lint`)
